data.title: Owlet Q4 Earnings Summary & Key Takeaways
data.description: Owlet (NYSE: OWLT) reported its Q4 earnings on March 5, 2026, at 04:05 PM. In the latest report, Owlet exceeded estimated earnings by 81.25%, with an EPS of $-0.03 compared to the expected $-0.16. Revenue showed a significant increase of $6.10 million compared to the previous year. Owlet had also surpassed EPS expectations in the preceding quarter. For a more detailed account, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: GoPro Q4 Earnings Report: What Investors Need to Know
data.description: On Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 04:05 PM, GoPro (NASDAQ: GPRO) released its Q4 earnings report. The company fell short of estimated earnings by -166.67%, posting an EPS of $-0.02 compared to the expected $0.03. Revenue showed an increase of $791 thousand from the previous year. This marks a significant deviation from their previous earnings records. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Order Up! OnePay Expands Rewards to Dining, Serves 3% Cash Back to Cash+ Customers
data.description: OnePay has broadened its collaboration with Kard to provide numerous local restaurant offers to customers, benefiting those seeking dining rewards. This consumer fintech company, trusted by millions of Americans for financial assistance, announced the news on March 5, 2026, in New York. The partnership aims to bring exclusive offers from thousands of local restaurants to customers using OnePay, signaling a significant expansion in dining benefits accessible through the platform.

data.title: AerSale: Q4 Earnings Insights
data.description: AerSale (NASDAQ: ASLE) released its Q4 earnings on March 5, 2026, at 04:05 PM. They reported an EPS of $0.16, falling short of the estimated $0.17 by -5.88%. Revenue decreased by $3.80 million compared to the previous year. For more details on the company's past earnings performance, investors can check the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: TUSK Practice Sales Advises Lombardi Plastic Surgery Center in Sale to Aesthetic Partners
data.description: TUSK Practice Sales, a top advisor in plastic surgery mergers and acquisitions, recently finalized the sale of a multi-location aesthetic and cosmetic surgery practice in New Jersey to Aesthetic Partners. The transaction was completed successfully and marks a significant deal in the industry. This acquisition occurred in March 2026 in Charlotte, North Carolina. TUSK Practice Sales is a leading expert in healthcare mergers and acquisitions.

data.title: Grove Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In San Francisco, Grove Collaborative Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: GROV), a pioneer as the first plastic-neutral retailer and prominent sustainable consumer products firm, announced financial outcomes for the last quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025. Noteworthy figures for the fourth quarter of 2025 include a Total Revenue of $42.4 million, marking a 14.3% decrease from the previous year, while Adjusted EBITDA stood at $1.6 million. Grove Collaborative Holdings, Inc. further holds certifications as a B Corporation and Public Benefit Corporation.

data.title: Princess Polly Announces New U.S. Store Openings
data.description: Fashion conglomerate AKA Brands Holding Corp. (NYSE: AKA) has revealed plans to launch eight new Princess Polly stores nationwide, with further locations anticipated in the coming months. Set to open in the latter half of 2026, these stores will be situated in Houston, Texas; Frisco, Texas; Orlando, Florida; and Edina, Minnesota. Additionally, upcoming locations include Jacksonville, Florida; Nashville, Tennessee; and Boca Raton, Florida. Stay tuned for additional announcements as the company expands its retail footprint.

data.title: a.k.a. Brands Holding Corp. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: A company known as Brands Holding Corp. (NYSE: AKA), which holds a collection of modern fashion brands, shared their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. During this quarter, there was a 3.1% rise in net sales, reaching $164.0 million, in comparison to the $159.0 million generated in the fourth quarter of 2024; marking a 2.8% increase when adjusted for constant currency1. Within the U.S., net sales grew by 5.3% compared to the previous year's fourth quarter. However, the company reported a net loss of $(14.5) million during this period.

data.title: Torrid Announces Reporting Date for Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In CITY OF INDUSTRY, California, Torrid Holdings Inc. (NYSE: CURV), a leading direct-to-consumer brand for women sizes 10 to 30 in North America, is set to report its fourth-quarter and fiscal 2025 financial results on March 19, 2026, post-market closure. Following this, a conference call will be held at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day for detailed discussions on the financial performance. This call presents an opportunity for stakeholders and interested individuals to engage with the management team and gain insights into the company's figures.

data.title: Traeger Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: Traeger, Inc., a leading company in wood pellet grills, has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. In the fourth quarter, total revenues saw a 13.8% decrease, amounting to $145.4 million, with grill revenues specifically dropping by 22.3% to $60.6 million. The net loss for the quarter was $17.2 million, a significant increase from the $7.0 million loss in the previous year. However, the Adjusted EBITDA showed a slight improvement, reaching $19.4 million compared to $18.4 million in the prior year.

data.title: Coherent Introduces Thermadite Liquid Cold Plates for High-Power Compute Applications
data.description: Coherent has introduced Thermadite™ 800 Liquid Cold Plates (LCP) for advanced AI accelerator cooling, catering to the increasing demand for efficient cooling solutions in the growing AI industry.

data.title: Global Indemnity Group, LLC Announces Quarterly Distribution
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Global Indemnity Group, LLC (NASDAQ:GBLI) revealed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a dividend payout of $0.35 per common share. This distribution is scheduled to be disbursed on March 30, 2026, to all shareholders recorded as of the market closure on March 20, 2026.

data.title: Rumble releases Q4 and full-year 2025 financials, showcasing strong performance.
data.description: In the latest report, it was disclosed that the current unemployment rate stands at 4.2%, which is a decrease from the previous rate of 4.5%. The economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing analysts' expectations. This positive trend is attributed to growth in various sectors, including manufacturing, technology, and healthcare. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw a slight increase of 2.5%, signaling potential improvements in workers' income. Experts predict continued economic growth in the coming months, fueled by increased consumer spending and business investments.

data.title: AudioEye Earnings Review: Q4 Summary
data.description: AudioEye (NASDAQ: AEYE) released its Q4 earnings report on Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 04:01 PM. The report revealed that their earnings exceeded estimates by 37.5%, with an EPS of $0.22 compared to the expected $0.16. Additionally, their revenue saw an increase of $767 thousand from the previous year. For a detailed analysis of their past earnings, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals Announces Grants of Inducement Awards under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc., based in Conshohocken, PA, disclosed on March 5, 2026, that it has granted equity awards to 20 new non-executive employees on March 1, 2026. These awards were given as equity inducement awards under Madrigal’s 2025 Inducement Plan. The granting of these equity awards was approved by Madrigal’s independent Compensation Committee in adherence to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: MDGL) is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing innovative therapeutics for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH).

THE UNITED STATES IS CONSIDERING A NEW FOUR-TIER FRAMEWORK TO REGULATE EXPORTS OF ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE CHIPS, WITH SHIPMENTS ABOVE 200,000 UNITS POTENTIALLY REQUIRING COMPANIES TO INVEST IN US AI DATA CENTERS OR MEET STRICTER SECURITY CONDITIONS.
